mapper.sql: id , company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark, file, product_id, outward_describe, insert_flag, is_use, sample_quantity, alias_name, sample_type, sample_remark
mapper.select:
select t1.id , t1.company_id, t1.sample_name, t1.sample_code, t1.specs, t1.batch_number, t1.manufacturer, t1.sample_origin, t1.outward, t1.save_place, t1.admin, t1.sample_groups, t1.quantity_per_group, t1.inspector, t1.received_date, t1.sample_requirement, t1.generation, t1.state, t1.check_date, t1.remark, t1.file, t1.product_id, t1.outward_describe, t1.insert_flag, t1.is_use, t1.sample_quantity, t1.alias_name, t1.sample_type, t1.sample_remark ,
, t2.company_name from test_sample t1 left join test_company t2 on t1.company_id = t2.company_id where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into test_sample (id, company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark, file, product_id, outward_describe, insert_flag, is_use, sample_quantity, alias_name, sample_type, sample_remark, picture) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receivedDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{file,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{outwardDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insertFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isUse,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sampleQuantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aliasName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{picture,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into test_sample
id,
company_id,
sample_name,
sample_code,
specs,
batch_number,
manufacturer,
sample_origin,
outward,
save_place,
admin,
sample_groups,
quantity_per_group,
inspector,
received_date,
sample_requirement,
generation,
state,
check_date,
remark,
file,
product_id,
outward_describe,
insert_flag,
is_use,
sample_quantity,
alias_name,
sample_type,
sample_remark,
picture,

#{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR},

mapper.update:
update test_sample
company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sample_name = #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR},
sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specs = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
batch_number = #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
save_place = #{savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
admin = #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_groups = #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity_per_group = #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inspector = #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_requirement = #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
check_date = #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file = #{file,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
outward_describe = #{outwardDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
insert_flag = #{insertFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_use = #{isUse,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sample_quantity = #{sampleQuantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
alias_name = #{aliasName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_type = #{sampleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_remark = #{sampleRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
picture = #{picture,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_sample set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sample_name = #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR}, sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, specs = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, batch_number = #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, save_place = #{savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, admin = #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_groups = #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity_per_group = #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inspector = #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_requirement = #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, check_date = #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file = #{file,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, outward_describe = #{outwardDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, insert_flag = #{insertFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_use = #{isUse,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sample_quantity = #{sampleQuantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, alias_name = #{aliasName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_type = #{sampleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_remark = #{sampleRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, picture = #{picture,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_sample set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sample_name = #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR}, sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, specs = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, batch_number = #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, save_place = #{savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, admin = #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_groups = #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity_per_group = #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inspector = #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_requirement = #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, check_date = #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file = #{file,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, outward_describe = #{outwardDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, insert_flag = #{insertFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_use = #{isUse,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sample_quantity = #{sampleQuantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, alias_name = #{aliasName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_type = #{sampleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_remark = #{sampleRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_sample set specs = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, batch_number = #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, outward_describe = #{outwardDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, alias_name = #{aliasName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_remark = #{sampleRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_sample (company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark, file, product_id, outward_describe, insert_flag, is_use, sample_quantity, alias_name, sample_type, sample_remark, picture) values
(#{entity.companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{entity.sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.receivedDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.file,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.outwardDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.insertFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.isUse,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.sampleQuantity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.aliasName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.sampleType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.sampleRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.picture,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, product_id, sample_name, sample_code, manufacturer, specs, inspector, generation, received_date, batch_number FROM test_sample
is_use = 0
and sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and batch_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{batchNumber},'%')
and manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%',#{manufacturer},'%')
and str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= str_to_date( #{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) <= str_to_date( #{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and product_id = #{productId}
and company_id = #{companyId}
order by sample_code DESC,str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) desc

SELECT t1.id, sample_name, sample_code, manufacturer, specs, inspector, generation, received_date, t2.standard_file_id standardFileId FROM test_sample t1 LEFT JOIN test_product_standard_file_rel t2 ON t1.product_id = t2.product_id
is_use = 0
and sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and batch_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{batchNumber},'%')
and manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%',#{manufacturer},'%')
and str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= str_to_date( #{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) <= str_to_date( #{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and product_id = #{productId}
and company_id = #{companyId}
order by sample_code DESC,str_to_date( received_date, '%Y-%m-%d' ) desc
SELECT id VALUE, CONCAT( CODE, '《', NAME, '》' ) label FROM test_standard_file WHERE id = #{standardFileId}
